message:
chore: include concurrent changes from other agents

- compaction.rs: keep tool call/result chains together at cut points
- pi_wasm.rs: move TWO_POW constants to module scope
- anthropic.rs: trivial raw string literal cleanup in test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1197,7 +1197,7 @@ mod tests {
         let body = [
             r#"data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"usage":{"input_tokens":1}}}"#,
             "",
-            r#"data: {invalid-json}"#,
+            r"data: {invalid-json}",
             "",
             // This should not be emitted after parse error.
             r#"data: {"type":"message_stop"}"#,
